topic: How to find your first dog walking client in 3 days
caption:
Your first dog walking client is closer than you think. 🐾
Text 10 neighbors today. Post on Nextdoor tomorrow. Offer one free walk on day 3.
Most teens lock in their first paying client within a week using this exact method.
See more starter hustle playbooks at hustleup.us

alt_text: A teen smiling while walking two dogs on a sunny suburban street, with a simple three-day action plan graphic overlaid on the image.

copy.headline: Land Your First Dog Walking Client In 3 Days
copy.body: Day 1: Text 10 neighbors. Day 2: Post in your local Facebook/Nextdoor group. Day 3: Offer one free 20-min walk to seal the deal. Charge $15-20 per walk after that.
